title: Prathinidhi 2
subTitle: A man constantly fights corruption at the political level, however, when a high-ranking politician is involved in a shocking incident, he is named as the prime suspect.

title: Mooga Nomu
subTitle: A young unmarried woman has a child but is told that her baby is stillborn. Thereafter, she joins an orphanage as a teacher where she encounters a man who accuses her of being immoral.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Yuga Purushudu
subTitle: Ostracised for marrying a man from a different caste, Janaki gives birth to a boy, Kalyan. Soon, under the guise of bringing the mother and son back home, Janaki's cousin plans to kill them.

title: Mee Adbutha Samayam
subTitle: A religious scholar reads verses from the Bible and highlights the virtues of Jesus Christ. He further encourages His followers to lead a pious life.

title: Alludu Garu Vacharu
subTitle: To help his childhood friend, Mahalakshmi, avoid an arranged marriage, Murali pretends to be her husband. However, they slowly fall in love with each other.

title: Bindaas
subTitle: Ajay, a feisty individual, takes matters into his own hands and decides to put an end to an age-old conflict between two families of the same lineage.

title: Ramudochadu
subTitle: Ram, an NRI, goes to a village in India in order to end the enmity between his parents' families. He meets Sundaralakshmi in college and falls in love with her.

title: Anasuyamma Gari Alludu
subTitle: Harikrishna, a mechanic, and Rukmini, a girl from a rich family, fall in love. However, things take a turn when he discovers that her mother is his aunt who destroyed his mother's life.

title: Oosaravelli
subTitle: Tony, a man involved in mercenary activities saves an abducted woman, Niharika, from a group of hooligans. Later, he falls in love with her and sets out to avenge the deaths of her family members.

title: Chusoddam Randi
subTitle: A broker falls in love with a woman who seeks shelter at his house and claims to be her husband to protect her from a goon.

title: Chusoddam Randi
subTitle: A broker falls in love with a woman who seeks shelter at his house and claims to be her husband to protect her from a goon.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Greeku Veerudu
subTitle: Sirisha, the daughter of a rich businessman, falls in love with Rajesh, a middle-class boy. However, their love story faces the opposition of her father, who wishes to kill Rajesh.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Giri
subTitle: A village leader swears to kill his rival's son due to a grave misunderstanding but a loyal servant helps the boy escape. However, things take a turn when he returns to the village, 20 years later.

title: The Lords Challenge
subTitle: A religious scholar delivers a discourse about the teachings of the Bible to urge the devotees to follow a righteous path.

title: Kirrak Party
subTitle: College friends Krishna and Meera work together on a book based on a sex worker. However, when Meera's subject delivers a baby, she sees a different side of Krishna, which strengthens their bond.

title: Saarocharu
subTitle: Sandhya ends her relationship with Karthik when he lies about his divorce. However, when she agrees to marry Gautham, he tries to reunite the lovers.

title: MLA
subTitle: A simple man falls for a rich landlord's daughter and in order to prove his love and marry her, he must become an MLA and succeed.

title: Bombayi Priyudu
subTitle: Priya becomes a vessel for the vengeful spirit of Kaveri. Meanwhile, an antique car gets haunted by the ghost of Kaveri's brother, both seeking retribution for their tragic demise.

title: Gabbar singh
subTitle: Gabbar singh

title: Aswathama
subTitle: A man returns to India for his sister's engagement ceremony but discovers that something terrible has happened to her. On his quest for the truth, he uncovers a series of crimes against women.

title: Aswathama
subTitle: A man returns to India for his sister's engagement ceremony but discovers that something terrible has happened to her. On his quest for the truth, he uncovers a series of crimes against women.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Chanakya Chandragupta
subTitle: Chandragupta Maurya, a courageous king, defeats Alexander the Great and goes on to establish the Maurya Empire with the assistance of his mentor, Chanakya.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Buridi
subTitle: A gangster and his assistant take a contract to kill a woman in Bangkok. However, their plans are jeopardised when they lose all the important information for the hit.

title: Abhishekam
subTitle: When Vijay, a budding musician, finds out that he has inherited a fatal disease from his father, he persuades his lookalike, Sambaiah, to take care of his ailing mother.

title: Gemini
subTitle: Gemini, a gangster, falls for Manisha, who reciprocates his love without knowing his truth. After getting arrested and completing his term, he tries to convince his lover that he is a changed man.

title: Rayudu
subTitle: Rani rejects Madhu's love due to her father's hatred for his family. However, she is appalled when her father gets married to Lakshmi.

title: Petta
subTitle: In a bid to save his best friend's son Anwar, hostel warden Kaali goes against local goons. However, everything goes haywire when he is forced to face his past.

title: Ayodhya Ramaiah
subTitle: Ayodhya Ramayya, an honest police officer, gets killed by a dreaded gangster. His son learns about his father's death and takes matters further by exposing the gangster's evil deeds.

title: Ungarala Rambabu
subTitle: Ram Babu becomes a strong believer in astrology after Badam Baba helps him. Later, he decides to fight with Savitri's father for his love as Badam Baba tells him to marry her at any cost.
